text.title: Python Ecosystem Overview — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when python-overview is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.description: Decision record says 'maybe web maybe automation'.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Downstream methodology choice impossible; team relitigates every PR. Fix: Force a primary domain in the decision record; secondary work goes in a separate sub-project.

antipattern.description: FastAPI + Flask + Django all in one repo.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Triple config; conflicting conventions; impossible to onboard. Fix: One framework per repo; split if needed.

antipattern.description: Skipping the imports survey on existing repos.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Misses the dominant framework already present; routes to the wrong methodology. Fix: Run a grep on import statements; tally framework presence.
